title: Milling, Amanda - Government Whip for HM Treasury, House of Commons - ACOBA Advice
body: "Dame Amanda left her role at HM Treasury in July 2024  Member of the Independent Advisory Board, Tees Valley Combined Authority  Dame Amanda sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with  Tees Valley Combined Authority. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in July 2025; and the appointment was taken up the following month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Consultant, Johnson and Lubbock Partners Limited  Dame Amanda sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Johnson and Lubbock Partners. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in February 2025; and the appointment was taken up the following month. An accessible version of the letter is available here.  Chief Operating Officer, Millbank Global  Dame Amanda sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Millbank Global. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in December 2024 and the appointment was taken up the following month. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
